title: Uruguayan Fish Empanadas
description: A classic Uruguayan dish of flaky pastry pockets filled with a zesty fish filling, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: 2. Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
3. Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
4. In a bowl, mix together the fish, citrus zest, Uruguayan salsa criolla, and beaten egg.
5. Place a tablespoon of the fish mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
6. Fold the dough over the filling to form a triangle or square shape, and press the edges together to seal.
7. Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little water and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
